specific_location: Bar J H on the south end of Chico Basin Ranch
description: A mostly white Tyrranus flycatcher that had an extremely long tail. Grayish wings and back. Slamon-orange wing lining. The tail was mostly black with white tips on most of the feathers. Bill blackBehaviors: The bird flew past, landed on a small shrub for a couple of minutes and flew over to some cottonwoods and disappeared.Call: None notedPlumage: one definitive adult
